_comment: JavaScript/TypeScript project hooks example. Copy to your project's .claude/settings.json
_usage: Place this content in your project's .claude/settings.json file

hooks.command: FILE_PATH="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$FILE_PATH" ] && echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(js|ts|jsx|tsx|json|md)$'; then cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; if [ -f "package.json" ]; then if command -v npx >/dev/null 2>&1; then npx prettier --write "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; npx eslint --fix "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; fi; fi; fi; exit 0

FILE_PATH=$(echo '$TOOL_INPUT' | grep -o '"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\)"$/\1/' 2>/dev/null); PROTECTED='.env .secret credentials package-lock.json yarn.lock private_key node_modules'; for p in $PROTECTED; do case "$FILE_PATH" in *$p*) echo "BLOCKED: Cannot edit protected file: $FILE_PATH" >&2; exit 2;; esac; done; exit 0
